file_name: Polyimide-Derived Supramolecular Systems Containing Various Amounts of Azochromophore for Optical Storage Uses.md

source_refs.section_title: Polyimide-Derived Supramolecular Systems Containing Various Amounts of Azochromophore for Optical Storage Uses

文献信息.论文标题: Polyimide-Derived Supramolecular Systems Containing Various Amounts of Azochromophore for Optical Storage Uses

别名: pristine polyimide film based on m-CN and 6HDA
polyimide-based supramolecular film with PAA:AzoCN molar ratio 1:0.25
polyimide-based supramolecular film with PAA:AzoCN molar ratio 1:0.5
polyimide-based supramolecular film with PAA:AzoCN molar ratio 1:0.75
polyimide-based supramolecular film with PAA:AzoCN molar ratio 1:1

parse.why: 从给定文本中提取到明确完整的文献信息，包括DOI、论文标题、作者列表、期刊名称、年份、卷号、页码、文档类型、语言和关键词；文中明确命名并单独表征测试了9个独立的聚酰亚胺基薄膜聚合物样本，分别为纯聚酰亚胺薄膜SPIN0、4种不同偶氮生色团含量的未辐照聚酰亚胺超分子体系薄膜、4种对应经激光辐照处理的聚酰亚胺超分子体系薄膜，前驱体聚酰胺酸未被单独表征测试，因此未作为独立聚合物对象计入；结构特征依据聚酰亚胺的骨架结构特性进行标注。
